TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pararid sa manengneng no mita i ika koni tadamaanay a lifong, mahadefek to ko kasakitakit. Tadamaan to ko aniniay sapiadah sa kita o itiyaay ho, caayay ko mamasadak kona matiniay a demak sa. Tangasa i 2019 miheca saka 12 folad, no riyariyaran a icifa no Cong-ko U-han , masadak ko caayay kahapinang a adada no kemi. Sakalamkam sa masadak i kasa'etal no Cong-ko ko madenga'ay a tamdaw. Dadengadenga sa ko tamdaw tona cikemiay sa patahekal ko Ceng-fu no Cong-ko, malasakaedef to no U-han ato taliyok no kasa'etal. I sakacecay folad no 2020 mihecaan, palafangay no U-han i Tay-ko makinsa ira ko faelohay a lifong, sarakat makinsaay i papotal no Cong-ko ko tatinakoan a lifong. Ikor to mafetas to ko kadadenga nona Sin-kwan-pin-tu i kasakitakit, caay to pitolas macakat matongal ko ciadadaay no kasakanatal, malasaka itini i rayray no tamdamdaw, o satata'akay to a lifong no adada koni. Matenak to ko lifong, malasakadoka' ko rayray no sapiadah no kasakanatal. Saka tosa folad citodongay to sadipot no kasakitakit pangangan han kona adada " O Sin-kwan-pin-tu no 2019"(2019冠狀病毒病) han. pangangan han i Taywan "Lifong no kemi" han. O masamanay ko kasadak nona Sin-kwan-pin-tu saw? Ira ko somowalay, nawhan ira ko sawarak adada i tatirengan no pidadoki, komaen ko tamdaw to pidadoki madenga. Ira ho ko somowalay, o sapilifong a sawarak koni adada saan. Nika ona sowal awaay ho ka pawacayay, matiya ho awaay ko mafana'ay toni sawarak a adada, masamaanay ko sakaira sa. Sakalamkam sa macowat kona lifong, masaemang to ko madengaay a tamdaw no kasakanatal, caay pitolas matongal ko mapatayay a tamdaw, caay to pakatoor malosimet ko mapatayay, taring sa mateli i paisingan. Misatapang to malaedef ko kasakanatal, mapalowan to ko micomoday a tamdaw no roma a kitakit. o palafangay, malali'acaay maemin to mapalowan. Matalaw to ko finawlan masadak, makari'ang to ko kalomanmaan no malokatayalan, orasaka masakadoka' to ko kicay no edef no kitakit. O nika lifong masakafalic to ko pinangan a saki'orip no finawlan. Masadak caykanca citahepo to tangoyosan, icowacowa to mapalowan to ko tamdaw, milalat to fa'edet, mipespes to alekol sapitena' to lifong. O pinanam to maemin to pakacalayay ko pasifana', masa i loma' sato no tin-naw a minanam ko mitiliday. O matayalay to i loma' to a matayal, o manmaan pakacalay a kayki, masadak to ko faelohay a kicic o Yin-tuwan to ko sapidemak. Masakalahoday to ko sakatayal no pakacalayay, papilifet to sapi'emet no tamdamdaw. Sakaca karawraw malowan ko narakatan a tatokian, o rafas tatokian manga'ay ato laloma'an a malacafay. Nano 2021 a mihecaan, misatapang to pacocok to sakilifong ko finawlan, madengaay a mapatay a tamdaw mahapinang to ko nika lowan. Nano 2022 a mihecaan, malohak to ko lekakawa no kasakanatal, misatapang to palowad to masamanmanay a kalisaot no demak. Matiyatiya adihay ko malahedaway to nika lifong, ano masamaanay ko malokatayalan ato tatihiay no tireng a tamdaw. O nikaorira caay pitolas macakat ko tamdamdaw. Tangasa anini, matiyatiya caay pakafilo palahedaw tona Sin-kwan-pin-tu, nika makilim to no mita ko pakayraan ato sakalacafay tona lifong.
S.PHON: parariɬ~ɮ sa manəŋnəŋ no~u mita i ika ko~uni taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɾifo~uŋ, maħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u ko~u kasakitakit. taɬ~ɮamaan to~u ko~u aniniaj sapiaɬ~ɮaħ sa kita o~u itijaaj ħo~u, ʦaajaj ko~u mamasaɬ~ɮak ko~una matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak sa. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, no~u rijarijaran a iʦifa no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u o~u~u-ħan , masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ʦaajaj kaħapinaŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u kəmi. sakaɾamkam sa masaɬ~ɮak i kasaʡətaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋaɬ~ɮəŋa sa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~una ʦikəmiaj sa pataħəkaɾ ko~u ʦəŋ-fo~u~u no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u, maɾasakaəɬ~ɮəf to~u no~u o~u~u-ħan ato~u taɾijo~uk no~u kasaʡətaɾ. i sakaʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u **** miħəʦaan, paɾafaŋaj no~u o~u~u-ħan i taj-ko~u makinsa ira ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a ɾifo~uŋ, sarakat makinsaaj i papo~utaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u ko~u tatinako~uan a ɾifo~uŋ. iko~ur to~u mafətas to~u ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋa no~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u i kasakitakit, ʦaaj to~u pito~uɾas maʦakat mato~uŋaɾ ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u kasakanataɾ, maɾasaka itini i rajraj no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, o~u satataʡakaj to~u a ɾifo~uŋ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~uni. matənak to~u ko~u ɾifo~uŋ, maɾasakaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u rajraj no~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħ no~u kasakanataɾ. saka to~usa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u kasakitakit paŋaŋan ħan ko~una aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa " o~u sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u no~u ****"(*********) ħan. paŋaŋan ħan i tajwan "ɾifo~uŋ no~u kəmi" ħan. o~u masamanaj ko~u kasaɬ~ɮak no~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u saw? ira ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, nawħan ira ko~u sawarak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa i tatirəŋan no~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uki, ko~umaən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uki maɬ~ɮəŋa. ira ħo~u ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, o~u sapiɾifo~uŋ a sawarak ko~uni aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa saan. nika o~una so~uwaɾ awaaj ħo~u ka pawaʦajaj, matija ħo~u awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj to~uni sawarak a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, masamaanaj ko~u sakaira sa. sakaɾamkam sa maʦo~uwat ko~una ɾifo~uŋ, masaəmaŋ to~u ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasakanataɾ, ʦaaj pito~uɾas mato~uŋaɾ ko~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj to~u pakato~uo~ur maɾo~usimət ko~u mapatajaj, tariŋ sa matəɾi i paisiŋan. misatapaŋ to~u maɾaəɬ~ɮəf ko~u kasakanataɾ, mapaɾo~uwan to~u ko~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~uma a kitakit. o~u paɾafaŋaj, maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj maəmin to~u mapaɾo~uwan. mataɾaw to~u ko~u finawɾan masaɬ~ɮak, makariʡaŋ to~u ko~u kaɾo~umanmaan no~u maɾo~ukatajaɾan, o~urasaka masakaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ to~u ko~u kiʦaj no~u əɬ~ɮəf no~u kitakit. o~u nika ɾifo~uŋ masakafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u pinaŋan a sakiʡo~urip no~u finawɾan. masaɬ~ɮak ʦajkanʦa ʦitaħəpo~u to~u taŋo~ujo~usan, iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa to~u mapaɾo~uwan to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾaɾat to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət, mipəspəs to~u aɾəko~uɾ sapitənaʡ to~u ɾifo~uŋ. o~u pinanam to~u maəmin to~u pakaʦaɾajaj ko~u pasifanaʡ, masa i ɾo~umaʡ sato~u no~u tin-naw a minanam ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. o~u matajaɾaj to~u i ɾo~umaʡ to~u a matajaɾ, o~u manmaan pakaʦaɾaj a kajki, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a kiʦiʦ o~u jin-to~u~uwan to~u ko~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak. masakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u sakatajaɾ no~u pakaʦaɾajaj, papiɾifət to~u sapiʡəmət no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. sakaʦa karawraw maɾo~uwan ko~u narakatan a tato~ukian, o~u rafas tato~ukian maŋaʡaj ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a maɾaʦafaj. nano~u **** a miħəʦaan, misatapaŋ to~u paʦo~uʦo~uk to~u sakiɾifo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan, maɬ~ɮəŋaaj a mapataj a tamɬ~ɮaw maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u nika ɾo~uwan. nano~u **** a miħəʦaan, maɾo~uħak to~u ko~u ɾəkakawa no~u kasakanataɾ, misatapaŋ to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u masamanmanaj a kaɾisao~ut no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. matijatija aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj to~u nika ɾifo~uŋ, ano~u masamaanaj ko~u maɾo~ukatajaɾan ato~u tatiħiaj no~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u nikao~urira ʦaaj pito~uɾas maʦakat ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. taŋasa anini, matijatija ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u, nika makiɾim to~u no~u mita ko~u pakajraan ato~u sakaɾaʦafaj to~una ɾifo~uŋ.
S.FORM: Pararid sa manengneng no mita i ika koni tadamaanay a lifong, mahadefek to ko kasakitakit. Tadamaan to ko aniniay sapiadah sa kita o itiyaay ho, caayay ko mamasadak kona matiniay a demak sa. Tangasa i 2019 miheca saka 12 folad, no riyariyaran a icifa no Cong-ko U-han , masadak ko caayay kahapinang a adada no kemi. Sakalamkam sa masadak i kasa'etal no Cong-ko ko madenga'ay a tamdaw. Dadengadenga sa ko tamdaw tona cikemiay sa patahekal ko Ceng-fu no Cong-ko, malasakaedef to no U-han ato taliyok no kasa'etal. I sakacecay folad no 2020 mihecaan, palafangay no U-han i Tay-ko makinsa ira ko faelohay a lifong, sarakat makinsaay i papotal no Cong-ko ko tatinakoan a lifong. Ikor to mafetas to ko kadadenga nona Sin-kwan-pin-tu i kasakitakit, caay to pitolas macakat matongal ko ciadadaay no kasakanatal, malasaka itini i rayray no tamdamdaw, o satata'akay to a lifong no adada koni. Matenak to ko lifong, malasakadoka' ko rayray no sapiadah no kasakanatal. Saka tosa folad citodongay to sadipot no kasakitakit pangangan han kona adada " O Sin-kwan-pin-tu no 2019"(2019冠狀病毒病) han. pangangan han i Taywan "Lifong no kemi" han. O masamanay ko kasadak nona Sin-kwan-pin-tu saw? Ira ko somowalay, nawhan ira ko sawarak adada i tatirengan no pidadoki, komaen ko tamdaw to pidadoki madenga. Ira ho ko somowalay, o sapilifong a sawarak koni adada saan. Nika ona sowal awaay ho ka pawacayay, matiya ho awaay ko mafana'ay toni sawarak a adada, masamaanay ko sakaira sa. Sakalamkam sa macowat kona lifong, masaemang to ko madengaay a tamdaw no kasakanatal, caay pitolas matongal ko mapatayay a tamdaw, caay to pakatoor malosimet ko mapatayay, taring sa mateli i paisingan. Misatapang to malaedef ko kasakanatal, mapalowan to ko micomoday a tamdaw no roma a kitakit. o palafangay, malali'acaay maemin to mapalowan. Matalaw to ko finawlan masadak, makari'ang to ko kalomanmaan no malokatayalan, orasaka masakadoka' to ko kicay no edef no kitakit. O nika lifong masakafalic to ko pinangan a saki'orip no finawlan. Masadak caykanca citahepo to tangoyosan, icowacowa to mapalowan to ko tamdaw, milalat to fa'edet, mipespes to alekol sapitena' to lifong. O pinanam to maemin to pakacalayay ko pasifana', masa i loma' sato no tin-naw a minanam ko mitiliday. O matayalay to i loma' to a matayal, o manmaan pakacalay a kayki, masadak to ko faelohay a kicic o Yin-tuwan to ko sapidemak. Masakalahoday to ko sakatayal no pakacalayay, papilifet to sapi'emet no tamdamdaw. Sakaca karawraw malowan ko narakatan a tatokian, o rafas tatokian manga'ay ato laloma'an a malacafay. Nano 2021 a mihecaan, misatapang to pacocok to sakilifong ko finawlan, madengaay a mapatay a tamdaw mahapinang to ko nika lowan. Nano 2022 a mihecaan, malohak to ko lekakawa no kasakanatal, misatapang to palowad to masamanmanay a kalisaot no demak. Matiyatiya adihay ko malahedaway to nika lifong, ano masamaanay ko malokatayalan ato tatihiay no tireng a tamdaw. O nikaorira caay pitolas macakat ko tamdamdaw. Tangasa anini, matiyatiya caay pakafilo palahedaw tona Sin-kwan-pin-tu, nika makilim to no mita ko pakayraan ato sakalacafay tona lifong.
S.PHON: parariɬ~ɮ sa manəŋnəŋ no~u mita i ika ko~uni taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɾifo~uŋ, maħaɬ~ɮəfək to~u ko~u kasakitakit. taɬ~ɮamaan to~u ko~u aniniaj sapiaɬ~ɮaħ sa kita o~u itijaaj ħo~u, ʦaajaj ko~u mamasaɬ~ɮak ko~una matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak sa. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, no~u rijarijaran a iʦifa no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u o~u~u-ħan , masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ʦaajaj kaħapinaŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u kəmi. sakaɾamkam sa masaɬ~ɮak i kasaʡətaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋaɬ~ɮəŋa sa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~una ʦikəmiaj sa pataħəkaɾ ko~u ʦəŋ-fo~u~u no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u, maɾasakaəɬ~ɮəf to~u no~u o~u~u-ħan ato~u taɾijo~uk no~u kasaʡətaɾ. i sakaʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u **** miħəʦaan, paɾafaŋaj no~u o~u~u-ħan i taj-ko~u makinsa ira ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a ɾifo~uŋ, sarakat makinsaaj i papo~utaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋ-ko~u ko~u tatinako~uan a ɾifo~uŋ. iko~ur to~u mafətas to~u ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋa no~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u i kasakitakit, ʦaaj to~u pito~uɾas maʦakat mato~uŋaɾ ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u kasakanataɾ, maɾasaka itini i rajraj no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, o~u satataʡakaj to~u a ɾifo~uŋ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~uni. matənak to~u ko~u ɾifo~uŋ, maɾasakaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u rajraj no~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħ no~u kasakanataɾ. saka to~usa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u kasakitakit paŋaŋan ħan ko~una aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa " o~u sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u no~u ****"(*********) ħan. paŋaŋan ħan i tajwan "ɾifo~uŋ no~u kəmi" ħan. o~u masamanaj ko~u kasaɬ~ɮak no~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u saw? ira ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, nawħan ira ko~u sawarak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa i tatirəŋan no~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uki, ko~umaən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uki maɬ~ɮəŋa. ira ħo~u ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, o~u sapiɾifo~uŋ a sawarak ko~uni aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa saan. nika o~una so~uwaɾ awaaj ħo~u ka pawaʦajaj, matija ħo~u awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj to~uni sawarak a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, masamaanaj ko~u sakaira sa. sakaɾamkam sa maʦo~uwat ko~una ɾifo~uŋ, masaəmaŋ to~u ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasakanataɾ, ʦaaj pito~uɾas mato~uŋaɾ ko~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj to~u pakato~uo~ur maɾo~usimət ko~u mapatajaj, tariŋ sa matəɾi i paisiŋan. misatapaŋ to~u maɾaəɬ~ɮəf ko~u kasakanataɾ, mapaɾo~uwan to~u ko~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~uma a kitakit. o~u paɾafaŋaj, maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj maəmin to~u mapaɾo~uwan. mataɾaw to~u ko~u finawɾan masaɬ~ɮak, makariʡaŋ to~u ko~u kaɾo~umanmaan no~u maɾo~ukatajaɾan, o~urasaka masakaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ to~u ko~u kiʦaj no~u əɬ~ɮəf no~u kitakit. o~u nika ɾifo~uŋ masakafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u pinaŋan a sakiʡo~urip no~u finawɾan. masaɬ~ɮak ʦajkanʦa ʦitaħəpo~u to~u taŋo~ujo~usan, iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa to~u mapaɾo~uwan to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾaɾat to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət, mipəspəs to~u aɾəko~uɾ sapitənaʡ to~u ɾifo~uŋ. o~u pinanam to~u maəmin to~u pakaʦaɾajaj ko~u pasifanaʡ, masa i ɾo~umaʡ sato~u no~u tin-naw a minanam ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. o~u matajaɾaj to~u i ɾo~umaʡ to~u a matajaɾ, o~u manmaan pakaʦaɾaj a kajki, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a kiʦiʦ o~u jin-to~u~uwan to~u ko~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak. masakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u sakatajaɾ no~u pakaʦaɾajaj, papiɾifət to~u sapiʡəmət no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. sakaʦa karawraw maɾo~uwan ko~u narakatan a tato~ukian, o~u rafas tato~ukian maŋaʡaj ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a maɾaʦafaj. nano~u **** a miħəʦaan, misatapaŋ to~u paʦo~uʦo~uk to~u sakiɾifo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan, maɬ~ɮəŋaaj a mapataj a tamɬ~ɮaw maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u nika ɾo~uwan. nano~u **** a miħəʦaan, maɾo~uħak to~u ko~u ɾəkakawa no~u kasakanataɾ, misatapaŋ to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u masamanmanaj a kaɾisao~ut no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. matijatija aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj to~u nika ɾifo~uŋ, ano~u masamaanaj ko~u maɾo~ukatajaɾan ato~u tatiħiaj no~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u nikao~urira ʦaaj pito~uɾas maʦakat ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. taŋasa anini, matijatija ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~una sin-kwan-pin-to~u~u, nika makiɾim to~u no~u mita ko~u pakajraan ato~u sakaɾaʦafaj to~una ɾifo~uŋ.
